untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) news diffusion events - no news sentiment/event indicator available; (2) mutual fund forced liquidation contagion - no fund flow or order flow indicators available; (3) positive kurtosis in returns distribution - kurtosis calculation not in allowed indicators. Substituted with proxies: positive returns momentum (returns > 0), elevated volatility (hvol_20), and price above trend (close > sma_20), but these do not capture the core economic mechanisms of news diffusion and fund contagion.
translation_notes: Entry conditions use available momentum and volatility proxies: positive returns indicate post-event momentum, elevated historical volatility (hvol_20 > 0.02 = 2%) approximates high volatility regimes, and price above SMA_20 confirms uptrend. Exit uses RSI overbought (>70) as reversal signal. Original 'AUTHOR_SILENT' parameters replaced with reasonable defaults: 20-day lookback (SMA_20), 3% stop loss, 15-day max hold. Cannot fully capture news-driven contagion or kurtosis clustering without specialized data feeds.
